title: Sending and Demise of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ
titleArabic: بعثة النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ووفاته
description: The advent of the final Messenger of Allah marks the very first minor sign of the Hour. His passing signified the end of divine revelation.
descriptionArabic: بعثة خاتم الأنبياء والمرسلين هي أول علامات الساعة الصغرى، ووفاته تعني انقطاع الوحي السماوي.

hadithReferences.text: I have been sent and the Hour is like these two (holding up index and middle fingers).

scholarlyOpinions.view: The Prophet's mission is the first sign because no prophet comes after him until Qiyamah.

historicalEvidence: Occurred during the 7th century CE (11 AH / 632 CE).
contemporaryObservations: Historical reality acknowledged by universal Islamic consensus.

faqs.question: Why is the Prophet's death a sign of Qiyamah?
faqs.answer: Because he is the seal of the prophets, making his era the final epoch of world history.

title: Loss of Religious Knowledge & Spread of Ignorance
description: Knowledge will be taken away not by snatching it from hearts, but by the death of true scholars, leaving ignorant leaders to issue misguided decrees.
descriptionArabic: يقبض العلم بموت العلماء، حتى إذا لم يبق عالم اتخذ الناس رؤوساً جهالاً فسئلوا فأفتوا بغير علم فضلوا وأضلوا.

hadithReferences.text: Allah does not take away knowledge by snatching it from the people, but by taking away the scholars...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Refers to deep spiritual knowledge and genuine scholarly piety, not superficial data collection.

historicalEvidence: Observed across various eras following the loss of classical erudition.
contemporaryObservations: Proliferation of unverified internet opinions and loss of traditional scholarly authority.

faqs.question: Does internet access mean knowledge is increasing?
faqs.answer: Information is abundant, but genuine spiritual wisdom and qualified scholarly authority have diminished.

title: False Messiahs and Claimants of Prophethood
description: Around thirty deceivers (dajjalun) will appear before Qiyamah, each falsely claiming to be a prophet of Allah.
descriptionArabic: سيَكونُ في أمَّتي كذَّابونَ ثلاثونَ، كلُّهُم يزعمُ أنَّهُ نبيٌّ، وأنا خاتَمُ النبيِّينَ لا نبيَّ بَعدي.

hadithReferences.text: There will be thirty liars in my nation, each claiming to be a prophet...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Includes Musaylimah, Al-Aswad al-Ansi, Sajah, Mukhtar al-Thaqafi, and modern claimants.

historicalEvidence: Historical claimants such as Musaylimah al-Khadhab, Tulayha, and 19th/20th century cult leaders.
contemporaryObservations: Modern cult leaders asserting divine revelation or prophetic status.

faqs.question: Is Dajjal one of these thirty?
faqs.answer: The thirty are lesser deceivers leading up to the Great False Messiah (Al-Masih ad-Dajjal).

title: Widespread Open Consumption of Intoxicants & Music
description: People among the Ummah will consider alcohol, silk for men, adultery, and musical instruments permissible, disguising alcohol under different names.
descriptionArabic: ليكونن من أمتي أقوام يستحلون الحر والحرير والخمر والمعازف...

hadithReferences.text: There will be people among my Ummah who will consider permissible adultery, silk, alcohol, and musical instruments...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Refers to public normalization and legal reclassification of prohibitions.

historicalEvidence: Documented in various decadent imperial periods.
contemporaryObservations: Global commercial normalization of alcohol branding and 24/7 digital music streaming saturation.

faqs.question: What does 'disguising alcohol under other names' mean?
faqs.answer: Marketing alcoholic drinks under modern trendy labels, cocktails, and deceptive names.

title: Normalisation of Riba (Usury/Interest) & Dishonesty in Trade
description: A time will come when no person will remain except that they consume interest, or are touched by its dust.
descriptionArabic: ليأتين على الناس زمان لا يبقى أحد إلا أكل الربا، فإن لم يأكله أصابه من غباره.

hadithReferences.text: A time will come when everyone will consume usury, and if one avoids it, its dust will reach them.

scholarlyOpinions.view: Refers to fractional reserve banking and systemic fiat interest integration.

historicalEvidence: Expansion of global banking systems in the 19th-21st centuries.
contemporaryObservations: Global monetary reliance on interest-bearing central banks and credit structures.

faqs.question: Can an individual completely avoid interest today?
faqs.answer: While difficult due to systemic integration ('dust of riba'), Muslims must strive for Halal finance alternatives.

title: Acceleration of Distance & Telecommunications
description: Markets will draw close together and physical distances will be rapidly traversed through advanced means of transport and instant messaging.
descriptionArabic: لا تقوم الساعة حتى تظهر الفتن، ويكثر الكذب، وتقارب الأسواق...

hadithReferences.text: The Hour will not be established until markets draw close to one another...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Interpreted by modern scholars as global e-commerce, stock exchanges, and satellite communications.

historicalEvidence: The invention of the telegraph, internet, and modern aviation.
contemporaryObservations: Instant global stock trading, real-time video calls, and instant international shipping.

faqs.question: What does 'markets drawing close' mean?
faqs.answer: Global market integration where price shifts in one continent instantly impact traders worldwide.

title: The Rapid Passage of Time (Taqarub al-Zaman)
description: Time will seem to pass at an accelerated rate prior to the Hour, such that a year passes like a month and a month like a week.
descriptionArabic: لا تقوم الساعة حتى يتقارب الزمان فتكون السنة كالشهور...

hadithReferences.text: The Hour will not be established until time passes rapidly, such that a year is like a month...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Both a physical loss of barakah in time and perceptual acceleration due to fast communication.

historicalEvidence: Observed increasingly in modern fast-paced industrial society.
contemporaryObservations: Perceptual acceleration of routine and high-speed digital lifestyle.

faqs.question: Is this a physical change or psychological?
faqs.answer: Scholars hold both views: a loss of spiritual blessing (barakah) in time and modern psychological acceleration.

title: Increase in Frequent Earthquakes (Zalazil)
description: Earthquakes will become frequent, widespread, and devastating across different regions of the world.
descriptionArabic: لا تقوم الساعة حتى يقبض العلم وتكثر الزلازل ويتقارب الزمان...

hadithReferences.text: The Hour will not be established until knowledge is taken away, earthquakes become frequent...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Earthquakes serve as both warnings for reflection and physical precursors to Qiyamah.

historicalEvidence: Seismological tracking recording thousands of measurable seismic events annually.
contemporaryObservations: Recent major seismic catastrophes in Turkey, Syria, Morocco, and the Pacific Ring of Fire.

faqs.question: Does this refer to tectonic earthquakes or major end-times quakes?
faqs.answer: Includes both an increase in routine seismic frequency and the 3 massive end-times landslides (Khasf).

title: Widespread Waj' (New Epidemics & Pandemics)
description: Diseases and plagues will appear that were previously unknown among ancestors when immorality becomes open.
descriptionArabic: لم تظهر الفاحشة في قوم قط حتى يعلنوا بها إلا فشا فيهم الطاعون والأوجاع التي لم تكن مضت في أسلافهم...

hadithReferences.text: Immorality does not become widespread in a people until they announce it openly, except that plagues and new diseases spread among them...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Refers to novel pathogens resulting from moral decay and ecological disruption.

historicalEvidence: Outbreaks of Black Death, Spanish Flu, HIV/AIDS, and COVID-19.
contemporaryObservations: Novel zoonotic virus outbreaks and global pandemic emergencies.

faqs.question: How are pandemics connected to moral shifts?
faqs.answer: The Hadith links public open immorality with ecological/health consequences as divine warnings.

title: Competition in Building Lofty Towers
description: Destitute, barefoot, nomadic shepherds will compete with one another in erecting tall skyscraper buildings.
descriptionArabic: وأن ترى الحفاة العراة العالة رعاء الشاء يتطاولون في البنيان...

hadithReferences.text: When you see the barefoot, naked, destitute shepherds competing in constructing lofty buildings...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Refers to nomadic desert dwellers rapidly gaining wealth and competing in architectural height.

historicalEvidence: The rapid 20th-century transformation of the Arabian Peninsula into a hub of world-record skyscrapers.
contemporaryObservations: Burj Khalifa, Jeddah Tower, and Gulf architectural height competitions.

faqs.question: Who are the 'barefoot shepherds' in the Hadith?
faqs.answer: Refers to the Bedouin tribes of Arabia whose descendants transitioned from tents to ultra-modern towers.

title: The Land of Arabia Returning to Meadows and Rivers
description: The arid desert land of Arabia will not see Qiyamah until it transforms into green meadows, gardens, and flowing rivers.
descriptionArabic: لا تقوم الساعة حتى تعود أرض العرب مروجاً وأنهاراً...

hadithReferences.text: The Hour will not be established until wealth becomes abundant and the land of Arabia returns to meadows and rivers.

scholarlyOpinions.view: The word 'return' (ta'ud) indicates Arabia was historically green in ancient times and will revert prior to the end.

historicalEvidence: Geological studies confirming ancient lush river networks in the Arabian Peninsula during the Pleistocene epoch.
contemporaryObservations: Greening of desert regions in Saudi Arabia, dam projects, and recent unusual rainfall patterns.

faqs.question: Does geological history confirm Arabia was green?
faqs.answer: Yes, satellite imagery and paleoclimate data prove Arabia possessed lakes and river systems thousands of years ago.
